name: Tuna Salad for Two
recipeIngredient: 1 package Corkscrew macaroni (5 oz), cooked and drained
1 can Tuna (6 1/8 oz), drained and flaked
1/2 cup Provolone or mozzarella cheese, julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. On two salad plates, arrange the first 10 ingredients in the order listed.
2. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine dressing ingredients: olive oil (1/4 cup), lemon juice (1 tablespoon), minced garlic clove, white wine vinegar (1 1/2 teaspoons), Italian seasoning (3/4 teaspoon), salt (1/4 teaspoon), and pepper (1/8 teaspoon).
3. Shake the jar well to mix.
4. Pour over the salads and serve immediately.
